title: Homepage is indexable with global robots meta tag
description: Verifies the homepage includes a global robots meta tag indicating it is indexable.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/.
View the page source.
Verify a robots meta tag is present in the HTML head and indicates index and follow.

title: TrustBadgeBar is visible on the homepage
description: Verifies the homepage displays the TrustBadgeBar with key trust messages for conversion confidence.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/.
Scroll to the area immediately below the header.
Verify the trust badges bar is displayed with multiple trust messages.

title: OG image asset loads from /og-home.jpg
description: Verifies the OG image asset endpoint responds with a valid image so social previews can render.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/og-home.jpg.
Verify an image is displayed in the browser.

title: Homepage references /og-home.jpg in OG metadata
description: Verifies the homepage includes OG metadata that points to the new OG image asset.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/.
View the page source.
Verify an og:image meta tag is present and references the /og-home.jpg asset.

title: OG image has approximately 1200x630 dimensions
description: Verifies the OG image is sized for correct social preview rendering.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/og-home.jpg.
Open the image in a way that shows its natural dimensions in the browser.
Verify the image dimensions are approximately 1200 by 630 pixels.

title: Organic journey from homepage to product page preserves TrustBadgeBar and product navigation
description: Verifies a user can land on the homepage, see the trust badges, and navigate into a product detail page successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/.
Verify the trust badges bar is displayed below the header.
Click a product from the product listing to open its product detail page.
Verify the product detail page displays product information such as title and price.

title: Robots meta tag is present on a product page
description: Verifies a product detail page includes the global robots meta tag to ensure crawlability beyond the homepage.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/.
Click a product from the product listing to open its product detail page.
View the page source.
Verify a robots meta tag is present in the HTML head and indicates index and follow.

title: Robots meta tag is consistent across navigation
description: Verifies the robots meta tag remains present after navigating across pages via the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/.
Click a product from the product listing to open its product detail page.
Click the site logo to return to the homepage.
View the page source.
Verify a robots meta tag is present in the HTML head and indicates index and follow.

title: TrustBadgeBar does not overlap header content on mobile viewport
description: Verifies the TrustBadgeBar and header layout remain readable without overlap in a narrow viewport.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/.
Set the browser viewport to a mobile width.
Scroll to the area immediately below the header.
Verify the header and trust badges bar are both visible without overlapping each other.

title: Robots meta tag is not duplicated in the document head
description: Verifies only a single robots meta tag is present to avoid conflicting crawl directives.

steps.description: Navigate to https://jaleca.com.br/.
View the page source.
Verify there is exactly one robots meta tag in the HTML head.
